cards.back: The process of converting plaintext into unreadable ciphertext to protect data from unauthorized access
Unauthorized access to or disclosure of sensitive data
The process of creating, distributing, and managing encryption keys to ensure secure data transmission and storage
A security process that requires a user to provide two different authentication factors, such as a password and a fingerprint, to access a system or data
The process of removing identifiable information from data to protect individual privacy and prevent re-identification
